calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Brian Miles, Esq. 925-938-4500 for Plaintiff.
Zulaika Mayfield 650-834-6990 Defendant In- Person.

Hearing is held. The Court inquires re balance of amount owed. Plaintiff requests to garnish more per pay period. Ms. Mayfield agues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'s A HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The claim is granted in part and Denied in Part. The Levying officer is to garnish $200 per pay period and to release $551.13 to the Judgement Creditor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Zulaika W. Mayfield, 650-834-6990, Pro Per Defendant
No other appearances

Defendant did not provide proper notice of her appearance today to the Court and Plaintiff's counsel.

Discussed, not ARGUED.

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION after discussion, the Court continues this matter to September 18, 2023. Clerk to provide notice to plaintiff's counsel of the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
